title: Update TDMA documentation references in zephyr and spec alignment

close_reason: Updated all TDMA Kconfig help texts, test comments, link.h/link_ctx.c/rpl_dodag.h docs and spec cross-refs to precisely cite §2a.2/§2a.5 of spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md + ccp16.json validation.
